---
stack: shadcn
detect:
  - file: components.json
file_patterns:
  - pattern: app/globals.css
    purpose: shadcn CSS variables — primary token injection point
  - pattern: components.json
    purpose: shadcn/ui configuration — defines style, base color, CSS vars usage
  - pattern: tailwind.config.cjs
    purpose: Tailwind config — extends with shadcn's expected CSS var references
token_consumption:
  method: "css-vars"
  snippet: |
    /* app/globals.css */
    /* Generated by /frontend-design — tokens.json → shadcn CSS variable format */
    @tailwind base;
    @tailwind components;
    @tailwind utilities;

    @layer base {
      :root {
        /* Backgrounds */
        --background:       {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};
        --foreground:       {{NEUTRAL_900_HSL}};

        /* Card */
        --card:             {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};
        --card-foreground:  {{NEUTRAL_900_HSL}};

        /* Popover */
        --popover:          {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};
        --popover-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_900_HSL}};

        /* Primary */
        --primary:          {{PRIMARY_500_HSL}};
        --primary-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        /* Secondary */
        --secondary:        {{SECONDARY_100_HSL}};
        --secondary-foreground: {{SECONDARY_900_HSL}};

        /* Muted */
        --muted:            {{NEUTRAL_100_HSL}};
        --muted-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_500_HSL}};

        /* Accent */
        --accent:           {{ACCENT_100_HSL}};
        --accent-foreground: {{ACCENT_900_HSL}};

        /* Destructive */
        --destructive:      0 84.2% 60.2%;
        --destructive-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        /* Border, input, ring */
        --border:           {{NEUTRAL_200_HSL}};
        --input:            {{NEUTRAL_200_HSL}};
        --ring:             {{PRIMARY_500_HSL}};

        /* Border radius (shadcn uses --radius as base unit) */
        --radius: 0.5rem;
      }

      .dark {
        --background:       {{NEUTRAL_950_HSL}};
        --foreground:       {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        --card:             {{NEUTRAL_900_HSL}};
        --card-foreground:  {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        --popover:          {{NEUTRAL_900_HSL}};
        --popover-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        --primary:          {{PRIMARY_400_HSL}};
        --primary-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_950_HSL}};

        --secondary:        {{SECONDARY_800_HSL}};
        --secondary-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        --muted:            {{NEUTRAL_800_HSL}};
        --muted-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_400_HSL}};

        --accent:           {{ACCENT_800_HSL}};
        --accent-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        --destructive:      0 62.8% 30.6%;
        --destructive-foreground: {{NEUTRAL_50_HSL}};

        --border:           {{NEUTRAL_800_HSL}};
        --input:            {{NEUTRAL_800_HSL}};
        --ring:             {{PRIMARY_400_HSL}};
      }
    }
tailwind_version: "3"
tailwind_v3_config: "tailwind.config.cjs"
tailwind_v4_import: '@import "tailwindcss"'
animation_lib:
  name: tailwindcss-animate
  install: "npm install tailwindcss-animate"
  gpu_safe_patterns:
    - "shadcn components use `animate-in`/`animate-out` from tailwindcss-animate"
    - "All keyframes use `opacity` and `transform` — GPU compositor safe"
    - "Use `data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out` pattern"
    - "`motion-reduce:transition-none` on all transition utilities"
a11y_rules:
  - rule: "shadcn components are Radix-based — ARIA built-in"
    check: "Do not override role, aria-* props on shadcn primitives — they are set by Radix"
  - rule: "Focus ring via --ring variable"
    check: "Never remove focus-visible styles — they use --ring from CSS vars"
  - rule: "Color contrast in dark mode"
    check: "Verify --foreground vs --background HSL values meet 4.5:1 in both themes"
---

## Integration Notes

shadcn/ui uses a specific CSS variable naming convention where ALL variables are in HSL format (`H S% L%` — no `hsl()` wrapper). This is the critical difference from generic CSS vars adapters: tokens from `tokens.json` (hex) must be converted to HSL before injection.

**Hex → HSL conversion rule**: `#3B82F6` → `217 91% 60%` (hue degrees, saturation %, lightness %). The `hsl()` wrapper is applied by Tailwind at usage time: `hsl(var(--primary))`.

**`components.json` expected structure**:

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json",
  "style": "default",
  "rsc": true,
  "tsx": true,
  "tailwind": {
    "config": "tailwind.config.cjs",
    "css": "app/globals.css",
    "baseColor": "slate",
    "cssVariables": true
  },
  "aliases": {
    "components": "@/components",
    "utils": "@/lib/utils"
  }
}
```

**`tailwind.config.cjs` for shadcn** (references CSS vars, does not inline color values):

```js
/** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */
module.exports = {
  darkMode: ['class'],
  content: ['./app/**/*.{ts,tsx}', './components/**/*.{ts,tsx}'],
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        background:   'hsl(var(--background))',
        foreground:   'hsl(var(--foreground))',
        primary: {
          DEFAULT:    'hsl(var(--primary))',
          foreground: 'hsl(var(--primary-foreground))',
        },
        secondary: {
          DEFAULT:    'hsl(var(--secondary))',
          foreground: 'hsl(var(--secondary-foreground))',
        },
        muted: {
          DEFAULT:    'hsl(var(--muted))',
          foreground: 'hsl(var(--muted-foreground))',
        },
        accent: {
          DEFAULT:    'hsl(var(--accent))',
          foreground: 'hsl(var(--accent-foreground))',
        },
        destructive: {
          DEFAULT:    'hsl(var(--destructive))',
          foreground: 'hsl(var(--destructive-foreground))',
        },
        border:  'hsl(var(--border))',
        input:   'hsl(var(--input))',
        ring:    'hsl(var(--ring))',
        card: {
          DEFAULT:    'hsl(var(--card))',
          foreground: 'hsl(var(--card-foreground))',
        },
      },
      borderRadius: {
        lg: 'var(--radius)',
        md: 'calc(var(--radius) - 2px)',
        sm: 'calc(var(--radius) - 4px)',
      },
    },
  },
  plugins: [require('tailwindcss-animate')],
};
```

**Token mapping summary** (tokens.json → shadcn CSS vars):

| tokens.json | shadcn CSS var | Notes |
|-------------|----------------|-------|
| `color.primary.500` | `--primary` | Light mode |
| `color.primary.400` | `--primary` | Dark mode |
| `color.neutral.50` | `--background` | Light mode |
| `color.neutral.950` | `--background` | Dark mode |
| `color.neutral.900` | `--foreground` | Light mode |
| `color.neutral.50` | `--foreground` | Dark mode |
| `color.neutral.100` | `--muted` | Light mode |
| `color.neutral.800` | `--muted` | Dark mode |
| `color.accent.100` | `--accent` | Light mode |
| `color.accent.800` | `--accent` | Dark mode |

**Tailwind v4 note**: shadcn/ui has experimental v4 support. Check `components.json` `style` field — if `"new-york"` with `tailwindcss >= 4.0.0`, use the v4 CSS-based config approach and replace `tailwind.config.cjs` with `@theme {}` blocks in `globals.css`.
